item.title: Delta Corp Ltd. is Rated Strong Sell
item.description: Delta Corp Ltd. is rated Strong Sell by MarketsMOJO, with this rating last updated on 24 February 2026. However, the analysis and financial metrics discussed here reflect the stock's current position as of 20 March 2026, providing investors with the latest insights into the company’s performance and outlook. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: VL E-Governance & IT Solutions Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Continued Decline
item.description: VL E-Governance & IT Solutions Ltd has reached an all-time low, closing just 0.88% above its 52-week low of ₹11.21, reflecting a sustained period of underperformance across multiple time frames and highlighting significant financial and market pressures on the micro-cap software and consulting company. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: KIOCL Ltd Hits Intraday High with 8.35% Surge on 20 Mar 2026
item.description: KIOCL Ltd demonstrated robust intraday performance on 20 Mar 2026, surging by 8.35% to touch a day’s high of Rs 328.45, outperforming its sector and broader market indices amid positive trading momentum in the ferrous metals space. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: JSW Steel Ltd. Hits Intraday High with 3.0% Surge on 20 Mar 2026
item.description: JSW Steel Ltd. demonstrated robust intraday performance on 20 Mar 2026, touching a day’s high of Rs 1168, marking a 3.19% increase from its previous close. This surge outpaced the broader Sensex gain of 1.08% and the Ferrous Metals sector’s 3.16% rise, underscoring the stock’s relative strength in today’s trading session. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Gujarat Mineral Development Corporation Ltd. Hits Intraday High with 7.19% Surge
item.description: Gujarat Mineral Development Corporation Ltd. (GMDC) demonstrated robust intraday strength on 20 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 572, marking a 7.11% increase from its previous close. This performance notably outpaced the Minerals & Mining sector and broader market indices, reflecting significant trading momentum within the stock. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Centum Electronics Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.61% Surge on 20 Mar 2026
item.description: Centum Electronics Ltd demonstrated robust intraday strength on 20 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 2,956.40, marking a significant 7.61% gain over the previous close. This performance notably outpaced the broader Industrial Manufacturing sector and the Sensex benchmark, underscoring the stock's strong momentum in today’s trading session. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Cummins India Ltd. Hits Intraday High with 3.03% Surge on 20 Mar 2026
item.description: Cummins India Ltd. demonstrated robust intraday performance on 20 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 4,627.75, marking a 3.03% increase from its previous close. The stock outpaced its sector and benchmark indices, reflecting strong trading momentum within the Compressors, Pumps & Diesel Engines industry. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Supreme Engineering Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Supreme Engineering Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Iron & Steel Products sector, surged to hit its upper circuit limit on 20 Mar 2026, registering a maximum daily gain of 4.27%. This notable price movement was driven by robust buying interest, resulting in a regulatory freeze on further transactions and leaving a significant volume of unfilled demand in the market. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Cool Caps Industries Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Cool Caps Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the diversified consumer products sector, witnessed a significant surge in its share price on 20 Mar 2026, hitting the upper circuit limit of 5%. This sharp rally was driven by strong buying interest, a notable increase in delivery volumes, and a regulatory freeze on further trading, signalling intense demand that remains unfulfilled. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Auri Grow India Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Shares of Auri Grow India Ltd surged to hit the upper circuit limit on 20 Mar 2026, propelled by robust buying interest and unfilled demand. The stock recorded a maximum daily gain of 3.45%, significantly outperforming its sector and the broader market, as investors responded to heightened market activity despite the company’s micro-cap status and recent downgrade to a Strong Sell rating. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Dharan Infra-EPC Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Shares of Dharan Infra-EPC Ltd surged to hit the upper circuit limit on 20 Mar 2026, closing at ₹0.15, marking a maximum daily gain of 7.14%. This sharp rise was driven by robust buying interest, resulting in a regulatory freeze on further transactions for the day. Despite the micro-cap realty stock’s strong intraday performance, investor participation showed signs of moderation, highlighting a complex trading dynamic. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Silver Touch Technologies Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Silver Touch Technologies Ltd witnessed a robust rally on 20 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit limit with a maximum daily gain of 4.95%, driven by intense buying pressure and unfilled demand. The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices, signalling renewed investor interest in this micro-cap software and consulting company. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Osia Hyper Retail Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Osia Hyper Retail Ltd witnessed a sharp decline on 20 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit price limit of ₹4.99, marking a maximum daily loss of 4.95%. The stock’s plunge reflects intense selling pressure and panic among investors, with volumes surging yet supply remaining largely unfilled, signalling a bearish sentiment in this micro-cap retailing stock. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Eternal Ltd Sees Robust Trading Activity Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: Eternal Ltd, a large-cap player in the E-Retail and E-Commerce sector, witnessed significant trading activity on 20 Mar 2026, with a total traded value exceeding ₹2,096 crores and volume surpassing 90 lakh shares. Despite a modest 1.44% intraday gain, the stock’s technical indicators and institutional interest suggest a nuanced outlook for investors navigating this dynamic market segment. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: ANI Integrated Services Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: ANI Integrated Services Ltd, a micro-cap player in the miscellaneous sector, witnessed a sharp decline on 20 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit limit with a 5.0% drop to ₹62.7. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting intense selling pressure and a significant drop in investor participation. Time: 13 minutes ago
